rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARNOLD S GRIDLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Christine Bennett'S Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Further Responses And Production In Response To Form Interrogatories...
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Friday, September 7, 2007. Respondent Christine Bennett's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories, request for production of documents, and requests for admissions. The motion to compel responses to requests for admissions 62-70 is granted. Petitioners are ordered to serve verified responses within 10 days notice of this order. By granting the motion, the Court does not suggest that any discovery relating to the Estate of Elsie Gridley may be conducted in the case of the Estate of Arnold Gridley. = (610/BEC)
